event: dilated heart disease of ischemic origin
pulmonary CT compatible with severe bilateral SARS-CoV-2 lung infection (CO-RADS 6)
remained in respiratory care unit for 20 days
empirical therapy initiated with meropenem and linezolid
Pseudomonas aeruginosa (AmpC profile) isolated in tracheobronchial aspirate
initial empirical treatment with meropenem and colistin
isolate susceptible to ceftalozane-tazobactam, colistin, tobramycin
treatment with ceftalozane-tazobactam and inhaled colistin
Aspergillus fumigatus isolated from respiratory sample
two bacteremias due to Enterococcus faecium
CRP kinetics adjusted to infectious episodes
